description:
Use your phone as a camera directly in OBS Studio.


- Added the HEVC/H.265 video format.
  - Unlocks 60fps at 4K.
  - Option to capture 10-bit HDR video, if supported by phone.
  - Requires the latest phone apps (v9.0 or above).
- Added an option to disable "unbuffered" mode.
  - Allows for smoother video, at the cost of some latency.
  - Can be useful if WiFi signal is not perfect or when router/phone/PC are further apart.
  - Until now, DroidCam was hard-coded in unbuffered mode for near zero latency, which could sometimes result in jittery output.
Home page: droidcam.app/obs
HDR Guide: https://droidcam.app/obs/hdr
Tip: click [Watch] on this GitHub repository to get notified about new releases.
DroidCamOBS.Setup.2.5.0.exe (Windows 10+ (x64, arm64), OBS v32+)
DroidCamOBS_2.5.0_macos.pkg (macOS 10.13+ (x64, arm64), OBS v32+)
droidcam_obs_2.5.0_linux_x86_64.zip (Linux systems with FFmpeg7/libavcodec61 (x64))
